text_original: great as and fun yes you only can chat for a while it's keep up and stays with the story line pretty good
text_zh: 太棒了，很有趣，是的，你只能聊一会儿，它能跟上并很好地保持故事情节。
reply_original:
Wow, thank you so much for the 5-star review! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying the storylines and finding the AI's consistency "pretty good." 

Regarding the chat limits you mentioned, we'd love to hear more about your experience or any suggestions you have to make it even better.
reply_zh:
哇，非常感谢您的五星好评！听到您喜欢故事情节并觉得 AI 的连贯性“相当不错”，我们感到非常激动。

关于您提到的聊天限制，我们很想听听您的具体体验，或者您有任何能让我们做得更好的建议。
